canvas.html:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>pendulum wave</title>
    <style>
        * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
        body { 
            background: #0a0a0f; 
            overflow: hidden; 
            cursor: crosshair;
        }
        canvas { display: block; }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
<canvas id="c"></canvas>
<script>
const canvas = document.getElementById('c');
const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

let W, H, centerY, anchorY;
const pendulums = [];
const NUM_PENDULUMS = 24;
const TRAIL_LENGTH = 40;

// Physics
const g = 9.81;
const BASE_LENGTH = 180;
const LENGTH_INCREMENT = 8;

// Interaction
let mouseX = 0, mouseY = 0;
let mouseInfluence = 0;
let isMouseDown = false;

function resize() {
    W = canvas.width = window.innerWidth;
    H = canvas.height = window.innerHeight;
    centerY = H * 0.15;
    anchorY = H * 0.08;
    initPendulums();
}

function initPendulums() {
    pendulums.length = 0;
    const spacing = W / (NUM_PENDULUMS + 1);
    
    for (let i = 0; i < NUM_PENDULUMS; i++) {
        const length = BASE_LENGTH + i * LENGTH_INCREMENT;
        // Period = 2π√(L/g), we want them to complete different numbers of cycles
        // in a given time to create the wave effect
        const period = 2 * Math.PI * Math.sqrt(length / (g * 50));
        
        pendulums.push({
            x: spacing * (i + 1),
            anchorX: spacing * (i + 1),
            length: length,
            angle: Math.PI / 6, // Start angle
            angularVelocity: 0,
            period: period,
            damping: 0.9995,
            trail: [],
            hue: 280 + (i / NUM_PENDULUMS) * 100 // Purple to cyan gradient
        });
    }
}

function updatePendulum(p, dt) {
    // Simple harmonic motion with damping
    const angularAcceleration = -(g / p.length) * Math.sin(p.angle) * 50;
    
    // Mouse disturbance
    if (mouseInfluence > 0) {
        const bobX = p.anchorX + Math.sin(p.angle) * p.length;
        const bobY = anchorY + Math.cos(p.angle) * p.length;
        const dx = mouseX - bobX;
        const dy = mouseY - bobY;
        const dist = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
        
        if (dist < 200) {
            const force = (1 - dist / 200) * mouseInfluence * 0.02;
            const pushAngle = Math.atan2(dx, dy);
            p.angularVelocity += (pushAngle - p.angle) * force;
        }
    }
    
    p.angularVelocity += angularAcceleration * dt;
    p.angularVelocity *= p.damping;
    p.angle += p.angularVelocity * dt;
    
    // Calculate bob position
    const bobX = p.anchorX + Math.sin(p.angle) * p.length;
    const bobY = anchorY + Math.cos(p.angle) * p.length;
    
    // Update trail
    p.trail.unshift({ x: bobX, y: bobY, vx: p.angularVelocity });
    if (p.trail.length > TRAIL_LENGTH) p.trail.pop();
    
    return { x: bobX, y: bobY };
}

function drawPendulum(p, bob) {
    // Draw rod
    ctx.strokeStyle = `hsla(${p.hue}, 60%, 40%, 0.4)`;
    ctx.lineWidth = 2;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(p.anchorX, anchorY);
    ctx.lineTo(bob.x, bob.y);
    ctx.stroke();
    
    // Draw trail
    if (p.trail.length > 1) {
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(p.trail[0].x, p.trail[0].y);
        
        for (let i = 1; i < p.trail.length; i++) {
            const t = p.trail[i];
            ctx.lineTo(t.x, t.y);
        }
        
        const gradient = ctx.createLinearGradient(
            p.trail[0].x, p.trail[0].y,
            p.trail[p.trail.length - 1].x, p.trail[p.trail.length - 1].y
        );
        gradient.addColorStop(0, `hsla(${p.hue}, 100%, 60%, 0.8)`);
        gradient.addColorStop(1, `hsla(${p.hue}, 100%, 60%, 0)`);
        
        ctx.strokeStyle = gradient;
        ctx.lineWidth = 3;
        ctx.stroke();
    }
    
    // Draw bob with glow
    const velocity = Math.abs(p.angularVelocity);
    const glowIntensity = Math.min(velocity * 20, 1);
    const bobRadius = 8 + velocity * 15;
    
    // Outer glow
    const glow = ctx.createRadialGradient(bob.x, bob.y, 0, bob.x, bob.y, bobRadius * 3);
    glow.addColorStop(0, `hsla(${p.hue}, 100%, 70%, ${0.5 * glowIntensity})`);
    glow.addColorStop(0.5, `hsla(${p.hue}, 100%, 50%, ${0.2 * glowIntensity})`);
    glow.addColorStop(1, 'transparent');
    
    ctx.fillStyle = glow;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(bob.x, bob.y, bobRadius * 3, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fill();
    
    // Inner bob
    ctx.fillStyle = `hsl(${p.hue}, 100%, 70%)`;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(bob.x, bob.y, bobRadius, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fill();
    
    // Core
    ctx.fillStyle = '#fff';
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(bob.x, bob.y, bobRadius * 0.4, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fill();
}

function drawAnchorBar() {
    // Draw the bar all pendulums hang from
    const gradient = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, anchorY - 5, 0, anchorY + 5);
    gradient.addColorStop(0, '#2a1a3a');
    gradient.addColorStop(0.5, '#4a2a5a');
    gradient.addColorStop(1, '#2a1a3a');
    
    ctx.fillStyle = gradient;
    ctx.fillRect(0, anchorY - 4, W, 8);
    
    // Anchor points
    pendulums.forEach(p => {
        ctx.fillStyle = '#6a3a7a';
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.arc(p.anchorX, anchorY, 5, 0, Math.PI * 2);
        ctx.fill();
    });
}

function drawWaveConnector() {
    // Draw a line connecting all the bobs to visualize the wave pattern
    if (pendulums.length < 2) return;
    
    ctx.beginPath();
    const bobs = pendulums.map(p => ({
        x: p.anchorX + Math.sin(p.angle) * p.length,
        y: anchorY + Math.cos(p.angle) * p.length
    }));
    
    ctx.moveTo(bobs[0].x, bobs[0].y);
    
    // Smooth curve through all points
    for (let i = 1; i < bobs.length - 1; i++) {
        const xc = (bobs[i].x + bobs[i + 1].x) / 2;
        const yc = (bobs[i].y + bobs[i + 1].y) / 2;
        ctx.quadraticCurveTo(bobs[i].x, bobs[i].y, xc, yc);
    }
    ctx.quadraticCurveTo(
        bobs[bobs.length - 1].x, 
        bobs[bobs.length - 1].y,
        bobs[bobs.length - 1].x, 
        bobs[bobs.length - 1].y
    );
    
    const waveGradient = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, W, 0);
    waveGradient.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(200, 100, 255, 0.3)');
    waveGradient.addColorStop(0.5, 'rgba(100, 200, 255, 0.3)');
    waveGradient.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(200, 100, 255, 0.3)');
    
    ctx.strokeStyle = waveGradient;
    ctx.lineWidth = 2;
    ctx.stroke();
}

let lastTime = 0;
function animate(timestamp) {
    const dt = Math.min((timestamp - lastTime) / 1000, 0.05);
    lastTime = timestamp;
    
    // Fade effect
    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(10, 10, 15, 0.15)';
    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);
    
    // Update mouse influence decay
    if (!isMouseDown) {
        mouseInfluence *= 0.95;
    }
    
    // Draw wave connector first (behind everything)
    drawWaveConnector();
    
    // Update and draw all pendulums
    const bobs = [];
    pendulums.forEach(p => {
        const bob = updatePendulum(p, dt);
        bobs.push(bob);
    });
    
    // Draw pendulums
    pendulums.forEach((p, i) => {
        drawPendulum(p, bobs[i]);
    });
    
    // Draw anchor bar on top
    drawAnchorBar();
    
    // Instructions hint (fades out)
    if (timestamp < 5000) {
        const alpha = Math.max(0, 1 - timestamp / 5000);
        ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(150, 100, 200, ${alpha * 0.5})`;
        ctx.font = '14px monospace';
        ctx.textAlign = 'center';
        ctx.fillText('move mouse to disturb · click to sync', W / 2, H - 30);
    }
    
    requestAnimationFrame(animate);
}

// Event handlers
canvas.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
    mouseX = e.clientX;
    mouseY = e.clientY;
    if (isMouseDown) {
        mouseInfluence = 1;
    } else {
        mouseInfluence = Math.max(mouseInfluence, 0.3);
    }
});

canvas.addEventListener('mousedown', () => {
    isMouseDown = true;
    mouseInfluence = 1;
    
    // Sync all pendulums - reset to same phase
    pendulums.forEach(p => {
        p.angle = Math.PI / 6;
        p.angularVelocity = 0;
        p.trail = [];
    });
});

canvas.addEventListener('mouseup', () => {
    isMouseDown = false;
});

canvas.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
    isMouseDown = false;
});

// Touch support
canvas.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    isMouseDown = true;
    mouseInfluence = 1;
    mouseX = e.touches[0].clientX;
    mouseY = e.touches[0].clientY;
    
    pendulums.forEach(p => {
        p.angle = Math.PI / 6;
        p.angularVelocity = 0;
        p.trail = [];
    });
});

canvas.addEventListener('touchmove', (e) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    mouseX = e.touches[0].clientX;
    mouseY = e.touches[0].clientY;
    mouseInfluence = 1;
});

canvas.addEventListener('touchend', () => {
    isMouseDown = false;
});

window.addEventListener('resize', resize);

resize();
requestAnimationFrame(animate);
</script>
</body>
</html>
